dataset.name: Synthetic financial advisor sample packet
dataset.availability_note: Bundled sample documents are synthetic and intended only for local blueprint validation. Tax-form OCR sample image/label pairs are copied from the hyturing/US_tax_forms_donut fixture derived from NIST-SD2.

tax_form_ocr_source.name: US Tax Forms Donut Dataset derived from NIST-SD2
tax_form_ocr_source.license: MIT according to the Hugging Face dataset card
